OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Gruninger, plaintiff in pro per.
Hope Greenhill, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Tonie R. Brock, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. The parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal of the Action, which is not filed. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 259 Ostego Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94112. Trial date vacated.

JPT Andrew Westley, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported
